name: ccm-website-payload
description: A blank template to get started with Payload 3.0

scripts.deploy: pnpm run deploy:database && pnpm run deploy:app
scripts.deploy:database: cross-env NODE_ENV=production PAYLOAD_SECRET=ignore payload migrate && wrangler d1 execute D1 --command 'PRAGMA optimize' --env=$CLOUDFLARE_ENV --remote
scripts.devsafe: rm -rf .next && rm -rf .open-next && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation next dev
scripts.generate:types: pnpm run generate:types:cloudflare && pnpm run generate:types:payload
scripts.test: pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:e2e
scripts.danger:drop:d1:local: echo 'WARNING: This will completely drop all tables in remote D1!' && echo 'Press Ctrl+C to cancel, Enter to continue...' && read && rm -rf .wrangler
scripts.danger:drop:d1:remote: echo 'WARNING: This will completely drop all tables in remote D1!' && echo 'Press Ctrl+C to cancel, Enter to continue...' && read && pnpx tsx scripts/drop-tables-remote.ts
scripts.sync:d1:up: pnpm run danger:drop:d1:remote && pnpm run sync:d1:up:schema && pnpm run sync:d1:up:data
scripts.sync:d1:up:schema: wrangler d1 export D1 --output=./temp-local-export.sql --no-data && wrangler d1 execute D1 --file=./temp-local-export.sql --env=$CLOUDFLARE_ENV --remote && rm -f ./temp-local-export.sql
scripts.sync:d1:up:data: wrangler d1 export D1 --output=./temp-local-export.sql --no-schema && wrangler d1 execute D1 --file=./temp-local-export.sql --env=$CLOUDFLARE_ENV --remote && rm -f ./temp-local-export.sql
scripts.sync:d1:down: pnpm run danger:drop:d1:local && pnpm run sync:d1:down:schema && pnpm run sync:d1:down:data
scripts.sync:d1:down:schema: wrangler d1 export D1 --env=$CLOUDFLARE_ENV --remote --output=./temp-remote-export.sql --no-data && wrangler d1 execute D1 --file=./temp-remote-export.sql --local && rm -f ./temp-remote-export.sql
scripts.sync:d1:down:data: wrangler d1 export D1 --env=$CLOUDFLARE_ENV --remote --output=./temp-remote-export.sql --no-schema && wrangler d1 execute D1 --file=./temp-remote-export.sql --local && rm -f ./temp-remote-export.sql

PAYLOAD_SECRET.description: Generate a random string using `openssl rand -hex 32`
